stderr_substring: audit_path does not lead to STH root_hash
notes: Audit path tampered; root does not match the signed STH.

Tag stripping at the receipt layer: an attacker controlling the agent can strip impact_tags and bypass the sync counter-sign requirement. The verifier cannot detect this; defense is upstream PEP tag pinning (SPEC.md §12.7).

Common-mode failure on poisoned upstream context. All three layers (issuer, parent, PDP) saw the same poisoned input and signed honestly. AERF records what was, not what should have been (SPEC.md §12.6).
